lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Yes [sir/m'am]? Can I help you at all?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: You're in the main waiting area of Keldagrim Carts- station.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Cart-station? What goes on here then?

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Keldagrim is the hub of all the traffic of the dwarven realm. Almost every dwarven outpost has railtracks leading to Keldagrim, connecting them all for easy travel and transportation of goods.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Amazing! And what powers the carts? Magic?

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Oh, no no, we dwarves don't use magic. No, all of this is powered by steam engines, developed during the past few centuries after the Consortium came to power.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for the info.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can you take me?

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Let's see, we could let you travel to Ice Mountain, or to the Grand Exchange.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I could also let you go to White Wolf Mountain, since you've befriended our brothers there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a ticket.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: And where would you like to go?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a ticket to the Grand Exchange.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Oh, that service is free. Just hop on a cart on Track 3, and away you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a ticket to Ice Mountain.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: That'll be 150 gold coins please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I've run out of money.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I'm sorry, [sir/madam], but I don't believe you can hold the ticket.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Thanks, carts to Ice Mountain depart from track 1.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I've run out of money.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I'm sorry, [sir/madam], but I don't believe you can hold the ticket.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: You're alright, I suppose... I can let you go for 75 coins. And remember, carts to Ice Mountain depart from track 1.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to buy a ticket to White Wolf Mountain.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: That'll be 100 gold coins please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I've run out of money.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I'm sorry, [sir/madam], but I don't believe you can hold the ticket.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Thanks. Go to track 4 for carts heading to White Wolf Mountain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I changed my mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm sorry, I've run out of money.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: I'm sorry, [sir/madam], but I don't believe you can hold the ticket.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: You're a decent human, I suppose... I can let you go for 50 coins. Go to track 4 for the carts heading to White Wolf Mountain.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have to go.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Just remember, wherever you go, you go there faster through Keldagrim Carts.

sections.title: Inspecting the trapdoor at the Grand Exchange
Inspecting the trapdoor at the Grand Exchange with a follower

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Ahoy up there! You'd better pick up your follower before you come down here and ride the minecart.

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Ahoy up there! Would you like to ride our minecart to Keldagrim? It's free.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

sections.title: Riding a train cart at the front of the queue with a ticket and follower

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Watch out, [sir/madam]! Don't want anything to run over your follower!

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Tickets! Tickets!

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Buy your tickets here!

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Selling tickets!

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Ice Mountain carts departing from Track 1!

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Grand Exchange carts departing from Track 3!

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: White Wolf Mountain carts departing from Track 4!

lines.speaker: Cart conductor
lines.text: Mind the cart!
